Privacy Policy

This following document sets forth the Privacy Policy for the Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC website, www.dlxprint.com
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC (dlxprint.com) understands the importance of protecting the privacy of its users. By using the dlxprint.com website ("Site") and submitting your information on or through the Site, you (referred to hereafter as "you", "your" or "user") are giving your consent to the collection, use and disclosure of your personal information as set forth in this Privacy Policy. We will never share any of your information to any third party.


Collection of your personal information
There are many aspects of the site which can be viewed without providing personal information, however, for access to Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC customer support features you are required to submit personally identifiable information.


Sharing of your personal information
We may occasionally hire other companies to provide services on our behalf, including but not limited to handling customer support enquiries, processing transactions or customer freight shipping. Those companies will be permitted to obtain only the personal information they need to deliver the service. Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC takes reasonable steps to ensure that these organisations are bound by confidentiality and privacy obligations in relation to the protection of your personal information.


How we use cookies

How we use cookies
A cookie is a small file which asks permission to be placed on your computer’s hard drive. Once you agree, the file is added and the cookie helps analyse web traffic or lets you know when you visit a particular site. Cookies allow web applications to respond to you as an individual. The web application can tailor its operations to your needs, likes and dislikes by gathering and remembering information about your preferences.

You can choose to accept or decline cookies. Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can usually modify your browser setting to decline cookies if you prefer. This may prevent you from taking full advantage of the website.


Links to other websites
Our website may contain links to other websites of interest. However, once you have used these links to leave our site, you should note that we do not have any control over that other website. Therefore, we cannot be responsible for the protection and privacy of any information which you provide whilst visiting such sites and such sites are not governed by this privacy statement. You should exercise caution and look at the privacy statement applicable to the website in question.


Limitation Of Liability

Limitation Of Liability
In no event shall Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for damages, direct or consequential, resulting from your use of the Site, and you agree to defend, indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims, losses, liability costs and expenses, including but not limited to attorney’s fees, arising from your violation of any third-party’s rights.


Legal Disclaimer
This Site operates "AS-IS" and "AS-AVAILABLE," without warranties of any other kind. We are not responsible for events beyond our direct control. This Privacy Policy is governed by the Federal laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any legal actions against us arising out of or related to the Site or any services offered or provided therefrom must be commenced in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.


Changes to this Privacy Policy
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC reserves the right to make amendments to this Privacy Policy at any time. Kindly visit this page for any future updates.


Contact us on below address
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC.
13th St - Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 - Dubai - United Arab Emirates
Tel: +971 (0)4 2725202
email: print@dlxprint.com

Terms

Terms and Conditions of Use
It is important that you read the entirety of and understand this document.


Price, Payment Method
Prices are in United Arab Emirati Dirham. Payment may be made by credit card, bank deposit or cash on delivery.
Bank deposit payments require the proof of payment uploaded through email before we can proceed with printing.
Bank or wire transfers whether local or international may take a few days to reflect in the bank statement. Please note that we will only proceed with the production upon receiving the payment(s) in the bank.
In case of cheque bounce, we reserve the right to charge 200  as a penalty.


VAT
From 1 January 2018, the UAE has introduced VAT at a standard rate of 5%, which will be chargeable on goods and services in the UAE.
You may update your VAT details by sending us the necessary documents via email which will be reflected in your invoice.


Proofs and Artworks
If Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC submits to the client a proof of design / artwork, Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will not be responsible for any errors which appeared in the proof or artwork and which were not corrected by the client before the order was completed.


Cancellations and Refunds
Every order is subject to a cancellation fee. The cancellation fee is 10% or  200, whichever is less. This is to cover the prepress costs related to your order.

Cancellations and Refunds
Every order is subject to a cancellation fee. The cancellation fee is 10% or  200, whichever is less. This is to cover the prepress costs related to your order.
Orders paid by credit card are subject to a processing fee. This is charged by the credit card portal. For this reason, if you cancel by credit card we are unable refund you the full amount. Refunds may take 7 business days to complete.
Clients have the right to cancel or modify an Order as long as it has not started production.
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will be entitled to charge for work already carried out (whether completed or not) and materials purchased for the customer.
If the User ceases to pay its debts in the ordinary course of business or cannot pay its debts as they become due or files a voluntary petition for bankruptcy protection or an assignment for benefit of creditors or is the subject of an involuntary bankruptcy petition, then in any such event, Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC without prejudice to other remedies shall have the right not to proceed further with the contract or any other work for the client.


NON - PAYMENT
Retention of ownership
Until the client has paid all sums outstanding in relation to the Goods:
(a) Property in the Goods does not pass from Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC to the client.

NON - PAYMENT
Retention of ownership
Until the client has paid all sums outstanding in relation to the Goods:
(a) Property in the Goods does not pass from Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC to the client.
(b) If the Goods are in the client’s possession, the client holds the Goods as trustee for Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC and must store the Goods so that they are clearly identifiable as the property of Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC.


Exchange or Return of Goods
Please contact our Customer Service by phone or email within 7 business days from the date you received your printed materials.
In case of production errors and/or defects, we will offer to reprint your job.
Clients will be responsible for fixing any errors discovered during the design processor or authorise us to print as-is or we can make necessary modifications or design adjustments for a small fee.
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will not be responsible for any damages or claims incurred by you or your business caused by receiving printed materials which are defective or incomplete or which you receive later than the estimated delivery date.


Shipping Policy

(A) Delivery Notification Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will notify the client when the Goods are ready for collection by email or over phone.

Shipping Policy

(A) Delivery Notification Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will notify the client when the Goods are ready for collection by email or over phone.
(B) Collection Unless Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC and client agree otherwise, the client must collect the Goods from Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC premises upon being notified that the Goods are ready for collection.
(C) Incorrect delivery address In case of incorrect or invalid delivery addresses, multiple delivery attempts, Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC will not be liable to indemnify the client.


Quantity delivered
Every endeavor will be made to deliver the correct quantity delivered, but owing to the difficulty of producing exact quantities, estimates and/or orders are conditional upon a margin of five percent being allowed for overs or shortages which shall be charged or deducted on a run-on cost basis.


Force Majeure
Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC shall not be held liable for experiencing delays in performance as a result of strikes, lockouts, riots, floods, severe weather, earthquakes, fires, casualty, acts of God, acts of public enemy, epidemic, quarantine restrictions, freight embargo, lack of transportation, government restrictions of priority, litigation, insurrection, war, inability to procure required materials and other acts of failures beyond our control.


Governing law and jurisdiction

Governing law and jurisdiction
These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws in force in the Emirate of Dubai in which Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC premises are located and the parties submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Emirate of Dubai which may hear appeals in respect of any proceedings in connection with these Terms and Conditions.

Expert Printing Services in Dubai Built for Brands That Refuse to Be Invisible
                        
                        
                        
                            There's no shortage of printing services in Dubai. But there's a difference between a shop that prints your file and a partner that elevates your brand for life. At Deluxe Printing, we've spent over two decades doing the latter, investing in the finest printing technology, the sharpest talent, and the most comprehensive product range of any printing shop in Dubai. Unlike many printing agencies in Dubai that outsource production, every single job at Deluxe runs through our own in-house printing press, giving us complete control over color accuracy, material quality, and turnaround time. From Pantone-calibrated dye-sublimation textile printing to large-format UV outdoor signage, our production floor handles it all without touching a third party. We are the printing company in Dubai trusted by BMW, Schneider Electric, Kroll, leading UAE hotels, government entities, and hundreds of fast-growing businesses because when the stakes are high, guesswork isn't an option.

One Printing Shop. Every Print You Need.

As more people want quick and eye-catching fashion, our digital printing services help designers and clothing brands in the UAE stay innovative while managing costs and time.

pageContent:
What is the difference between backlit and 3D unlit signage?
          
        
      
      
        
             Backlit signage uses LED lights placed inside channel letters, creating a glowing effect visible day and night, ideal for shopfronts and high-traffic areas. Unlit 3D signage uses precision-cut acrylic or foam letters without illumination, giving a clean, premium look at a lower cost. The right choice depends on your environment, budget, and visibility requirements.
        
      
    
    
      
        
          Do you offer digital signage solutions in Dubai?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Deluxe Printing provides digital signage solutions in Dubai for corporate offices, retail environments, and public spaces. Our digital signage range includes LED display screens, lightbox displays, and illuminated signboards, designed for maximum impact indoors and outdoors across the UAE.
        
      
    
    
      
        
          Which signage companies in the UAE offer full installation services?
          
        
      
      
        
             Deluxe Printing is one of the few signage companies in the UAE that manages everything in-house, from design and fabrication to professional on-site installation. Our installation team covers all areas across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah, ensuring your signage is fitted safely, correctly, and on time.

pageContent:
Frequently Asked Questions
        
          
          
            
              
                What type of custom flags help attract attention at shops and events in Dubai?
                
              
            
            
              
                Feather flags, teardrop flags, sail flags, and curved top flags work best for stores and events. Feather and sail flags are tall and move nicely in the wind. Teardrop flags stay tight in any wind. Curved-top flags look neat in doorways and open areas. You can get all of these at Deluxe Printing in bright colors and different sizes.
              
            
          
      
          
          
            
              
                Which custom flags are suitable for events in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah?
                
              
            
            
              
                All our custom flags are made for use in the UAE. For outdoor events, big sail flags and L-shape flags are the best for visibility. For exhibitions and corporate events, medium teardrop and curved top flags are preferred. For indoor events, small flags (2m–3m) look clean and professional. Deluxe Printing delivers to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah within one business day after production.
              
            
          
      
          
          
            
              
                Where can I find high-quality flag printing services in Dubai?

                What are the best materials used for flag printing in Dubai?
                
              
            
            
              
                110gsm knitted polyester with UV-resistant inks is the best material for outdoor flags in Dubai. It can withstand temperatures up to 55°C and is resistant to sand. Satin-gloss polyester (double-sided) offers brighter colors for special events. Super matt polyester is good for business and luxury settings. All poles are made of aluminum and fiber to resist wind.

Frequently Asked Questions

  

    
    
      
        
          What types of backdrops does Deluxe Printing offer in Dubai?
          
        
      
      
        
          Deluxe Printing provides an extensive range of backdrops that can be provided for any events taking place in Dubai or the UAE region. This includes fabric backdrops, curved fabric backdrops, wood backdrops, light up backdrops, step-and-repeat backdrops, as well as customized backdrops. Every backdrop is available with a matching backdrop stand and custom printing to your exact design and dimensions.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          Is backdrop printing available on a rental basis?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Selected backdrops, backlit displays, and exhibition structures are available on a rental basis — ideal for single events, short-term activations, or occasions where a different custom backdrop design is needed for each event. Contact our team with your event date and backdrop format for rental availability and pricing.

pageContent:
How quickly can a custom backdrop be printed and delivered in Dubai?
          
        
      
      
        
          Most custom backdrop and standee printing orders are fulfilled within 2–3 business days, depending on size and complexity. We have speedy services to print backdrops in cases of emergency. You can tell us your date for the event and we shall inform you about the soonest delivery period we can deliver the backdrops to your destination in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and all over UAE.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          Do you offer personalized backdrops for birthday parties and celebrations?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Custom backdrops for birthdays, weddings, baby shower parties, and other private events can be made in various formats like fabric backdrops, wooden backdrops, arch standees, step-and-repeat banner backdrops, etc. Our design team would come up with a completely customized backdrop design based on your requirements regarding theme, colors, etc.

pageContent:
Can Deluxe Printing help with graphic design for backdrops and standees?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Our in-house design team provides complete art services for all types of backdrop/standee formats. If you want any corporate backdrop, custom-made backdrop banner for your product launch, birthday party backdrop, then our creative designers would design your artwork according to the print requirements and deliver to you in a perfect shape.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          What is standee printing and what types of standees are available?
          
        
      
      
        
          Standee printing basically means making large-size printed standees that are normally placed inside an event/exhibition area or entrance gate as freestanding single-frame display stands. Standee types include roll up banners, fabric standee, cutout forex standees, totem self-standing, lama stands, backlit standees, and X banners etc. All these types of standees are offered by Deluxe Printing.

pageContent:
Your Event Space Is Speaking, Make Sure It Says the Right Thing
        
            From a booth in a trade fair, product launch, corporate event, or birthday party, the backdrop is the first thing people notice and the last thing they snap pictures with. Poor printing on the backdrop, improper setup of the backdrop stand, and a generic backdrop setup say a lot about how much you care for details.
        
        
          What event organisers and brand teams face:
        
        
          ● Backdrops that arrive creased, faded, or the wrong size for the venue
          ● Backdrop stands that wobble, collapse, or require specialist assembly
          ● Generic designs that fail to reflect the brand or the occasion
          ● Sourcing multiple suppliers for backdrops, standees, counters, and props
          ● Last-minute printing that does not deliver on quality or deadline
        
        
          What we do differently:
        
        
            At Deluxe Printing, every custom backdrop, personalized backdrop banner, and display standee is produced in-house using premium dye-sublimation and large-format printing technology. Our full range from fabric pop up backdrops and backlit backdrop banners to wooden backdrops, custom backdrop stands, and printed standees means you source everything for your event in one place, with one team, on one deadline.
        
    
    
        25+ Years of Backdrop Printing Expertise

Frequently Asked Questions

  

    
    
      
        
          What types of backdrops does Deluxe Printing offer in Dubai?
          
        
      
      
        
          Deluxe Printing provides an extensive range of backdrops that can be provided for any events taking place in Dubai or the UAE region. This includes fabric backdrops, curved fabric backdrops, wood backdrops, light up backdrops, step-and-repeat backdrops, as well as customized backdrops. Every backdrop is available with a matching backdrop stand and custom printing to your exact design and dimensions.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          Is backdrop printing available on a rental basis?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Selected backdrops, backlit displays, and exhibition structures are available on a rental basis — ideal for single events, short-term activations, or occasions where a different custom backdrop design is needed for each event. Contact our team with your event date and backdrop format for rental availability and pricing.

metadata.description: Custom backdrop printing in Dubai for events, exhibitions & celebrations. Fabric, backlit & wooden backdrops, standees & display stands. Sales & rentals

pageContent:
How quickly can a custom backdrop be printed and delivered in Dubai?
          
        
      
      
        
          Most custom backdrop and standee printing orders are fulfilled within 2–3 business days, depending on size and complexity. We have speedy services to print backdrops in cases of emergency. You can tell us your date for the event and we shall inform you about the soonest delivery period we can deliver the backdrops to your destination in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and all over UAE.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          Do you offer personalized backdrops for birthday parties and celebrations?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Custom backdrops for birthdays, weddings, baby shower parties, and other private events can be made in various formats like fabric backdrops, wooden backdrops, arch standees, step-and-repeat banner backdrops, etc. Our design team would come up with a completely customized backdrop design based on your requirements regarding theme, colors, etc.

pageContent:
Can Deluxe Printing help with graphic design for backdrops and standees?
          
        
      
      
        
          Yes. Our in-house design team provides complete art services for all types of backdrop/standee formats. If you want any corporate backdrop, custom-made backdrop banner for your product launch, birthday party backdrop, then our creative designers would design your artwork according to the print requirements and deliver to you in a perfect shape.
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          What is standee printing and what types of standees are available?
          
        
      
      
        
          Standee printing basically means making large-size printed standees that are normally placed inside an event/exhibition area or entrance gate as freestanding single-frame display stands. Standee types include roll up banners, fabric standee, cutout forex standees, totem self-standing, lama stands, backlit standees, and X banners etc. All these types of standees are offered by Deluxe Printing.

                      Yes, we provide digital proofs to ensure your design looks perfect before printing. Once you approve the proof, we proceed with production.

                      What file formats do you accept for printing?

metadata.title: Frequently Asked Questions | Deluxe Printing Dubai
metadata.description: Find answers to common questions about Deluxe Printing’s services, custom printing options, delivery, and more. Get all the details you need in one place.
metadata.section: Frequently Asked Questions | Deluxe Printing Dubai

pageContent:
File Preparation
              
              
                
                  
                    
                      What file formats do you accept for printing?
                    
                    
                  
                  
                    
                      We accept high-quality file formats like PDF, AI, and EPS. For the best results, we recommend submitting vector files to ensure sharp and accurate prints. If you're providing an image file, please ensure it has a minimum resolution of 300 DPI for optimal quality
                    
                  
                
                
                  
                    
                      Do I need to include bleed and crop marks in my design?
                    
                    
                  
                  
                    
                      Yes, adding bleed and crop marks ensures that your design prints correctly without white edges. We recommend a bleed of at least 3mm on all sides.
                    
                  
                
                
                  
                    
                      How do I make sure my images don’t appear blurry or pixelated?

metadata.title: Frequently Asked Questions | Deluxe Printing Dubai
metadata.description: Find answers to common questions about Deluxe Printing’s services, custom printing options, delivery, and more. Get all the details you need in one place.
metadata.section: Frequently Asked Questions | Deluxe Printing Dubai

pageContent:
How do I make sure my images don’t appear blurry or pixelated?
                    
                    
                  
                  
                    
                      For the best possible print results, your file should be prepared in CMYK color mode, as this is the industry standard for professional printing. CMYK (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, and Key/Black) 
                    
                  
                
                
                
                  
                    
                      What color mode should my file be in—RGB or CMYK?
                    
                    
                  
                  
                    
                      Your file should be in CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction in printing. RGB is for digital screens and may not print as expected.
                    
                  
                
                
                
                  
                    
                      Can I see a proof of my design before printing?
                    
                    
                  
                  
                    
                      Yes, we provide digital proofs (Mockup) to ensure the final print meets your expectations. Once approved, we proceed with the production.

pageContent:
Privacy Policy
              
              
                
                  This following document sets forth the Privacy Policy for the Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC website, www.dlxprint.com
                   Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC (dlxprint.com) understands the importance of protecting the privacy of its users. By using the dlxprint.com website ("Site") and submitting your information on or through the Site, you (referred to hereafter as "you", "your" or "user") are giving your consent to the collection, use and disclosure of your personal information as set forth in this Privacy Policy. We will never share any of your information to any third party.
                  
                  Collection of your personal information
                   There are many aspects of the site which can be viewed without providing personal information, however, for access to Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC customer support features you are required to submit personally identifiable information.
                    
                  Sharing of your personal information

metadata.section: Deluxe Printing Privacy Policy

pageContent:
Sharing of your personal information
                   We may occasionally hire other companies to provide services on our behalf, including but not limited to handling customer support enquiries, processing transactions or customer freight shipping. Those companies will be permitted to obtain only the personal information they need to deliver the service. Deluxe Digital Advertising LLC takes reasonable steps to ensure that these organisations are bound by confidentiality and privacy obligations in relation to the protection of your personal information.
                    
                  How we use cookies
                   A cookie is a small file which asks permission to be placed on your computer’s hard drive. Once you agree, the file is added and the cookie helps analyse web traffic or lets you know when you visit a particular site. Cookies allow web applications to respond to you as an individual. The web application can tailor its operations to your needs, likes and dislikes by gathering and remembering information about your preferences.
                  You can choose to accept or decline cookies. Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can usually modify your browser setting to decline cookies if you prefer. This may prevent you from taking full advantage of the website.
                    
                  Links to other websites

Our Story
                
                    Since our founding in 1999, Deluxe Printing has grown from a traditional paper-stationery print house into a full-scale, multi-disciplinary production facility in Dubai. We proudly serve SMEs, large corporates, retail brands, and leading event agencies across the UAE.
                
                
                
                    Our journey reflects the rapid transformation of the local business landscape. As needs evolved, we expanded our core capabilities from essential printing to include specialized areas like large-format production, advanced textile printing, signage, and store branding.
                
                
                
                    Today, Deluxe is a comprehensive branding partner. We deliver end-to-end visual communication products including solutions for event and exhibition branding and premium corporate gifting. From a small print shop to a comprehensive branding partner, our evolution has always been guided by one vision: to empower your business with impactful, customized, and cost-effective solutions that stand out in the competitive UAE market.

What We Offer

Plus, the punctuality was spot on—everything arrived on time. Overall, a fantastic and satisfying experience!
